title: Reproduce the aminoglycoside BGC comparison in the web app
summary: Build a five-cluster linear comparison with browser LOSATP orthogroups, antiSMASH gene-kind color rules, rotated labels, and a bottom legend.
primaryWorkflow: LOSATP orthogroups with feature color rules
requirements: The five MIBiG GenBank flat files listed below.
GenBank features that retain antiSMASH qualifiers such as gene_kind.
Use a local copy of gbdraw.app or the hosted web app; genome processing runs in the browser.

downloads.label: BGC0000708
downloads.note: Download the lividomycin biosynthetic gene cluster as GenBank.

downloads.label: BGC0000709
downloads.note: Download the neomycin biosynthetic gene cluster as GenBank.

downloads.label: BGC0000711
downloads.note: Download the second neomycin biosynthetic gene cluster as GenBank.

downloads.label: BGC0000712
downloads.note: Download the paromomycin biosynthetic gene cluster as GenBank.

downloads.label: BGC0000713
downloads.note: Download the ribostamycin biosynthetic gene cluster as GenBank.

quickReproduce.title: Download the Gallery session
quickReproduce.body: Use the Session button in this Gallery entry to save BGC0000708-BGC0000713.gbdraw-session.json.

media.alt: Gallery header for the aminoglycoside biosynthetic gene cluster comparison with the Session action visible.
media.caption: The Gallery entry keeps the finished interactive SVG, downloadable SVG, and session JSON together.

operations.title: Session button for this Gallery entry
operations.body: Use the rendered Gallery action toolbar and click Session.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC tutorial Gallery .viewer-actions toolbar with the Session action visible.
media.caption: The rendered Gallery .viewer-actions toolbar shows the Session action in context.

quickReproduce.title: Open the web app
quickReproduce.body: Open gbdraw.app, then load the saved .gbdraw-session.json from the session controls.

operations.title: Header session controls
operations.body: Use the rendered web app header toolbar and click Load Session.

media.alt: Actual Linear web app header toolbar with Load Session, Save Session, Reset Settings, undo and redo, the session title, and mode controls visible.
media.caption: The rendered .app-toolbar crop shows the Load Session control in its real header-toolbar context.

quickReproduce.title: Inspect the restored settings
quickReproduce.body: The session restores the input files, LOSATP cache, orthogroup settings, record labels, color rules, rotated labels, legend position, and generated SVG state.

operations.title: Restored BGC settings summary
operations.body: Use the rendered Restored BGC settings summary with Pairwise and color settings.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC tutorial UI showing Restored BGC settings summary with Pairwise and color settings.
media.caption: The rendered web app crop shows Restored BGC settings summary; Pairwise and color settings.

manualSteps.title: Switch to Linear mode
manualSteps.body: Open gbdraw.app and select Linear mode before adding inputs.

operations.title: Mode segmented control
operations.body: Select Linear in the rendered mode segmented control.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC tutorial UI showing Mode segmented control with Linear selected.
media.caption: Select Linear in the rendered mode segmented control.

manualSteps.title: Upload the five GenBank files
manualSteps.body: Keep the records in the same order as the Gallery command so adjacent orthogroup tracks and labels match the saved example.

operations.title: Linear GenBank uploader with five BGC files
operations.body: Use the rendered upload rows so file chips in order is visible.

media.alt: Actual Linear Input Genomes uploader rows showing BGC0000708.gbk, BGC0000709.gbk, BGC0000711.gbk, BGC0000712.gbk, and BGC0000713.gbk in order.
media.caption: The rendered Linear GenBank upload rows show the five BGC files in the same order as the Gallery command.

manualSteps.title: Configure browser LOSAT
manualSteps.body: In Pairwise Comparisons, choose Run LOSAT. Use LOSATP with blastp mode Orthogroups.
manualSteps.note: This example compares protein-coding genes across related biosynthetic gene clusters, so orthogroup-backed blastp matches are the useful comparison signal.

operations.title: Run LOSAT settings panel
operations.body: Use the rendered Pairwise Comparisons panel with expanded panel.

media.alt: Actual Linear Run LOSAT settings panel with Run LOSAT selected, LOSATP selected, and execution and thread controls visible.
media.caption: The rendered LOSAT settings panel shows the Run LOSAT source, LOSATP mode, and browser execution controls.

operations.title: LOSATP orthogroups mode
operations.body: Use the rendered LOSATP orthogroups mode with Orthogroups selected.

media.alt: Actual LOSATP blastp mode control with Orthogroups selected.
media.caption: Use the blastp mode selector in the LOSAT settings panel and choose Orthogroups.

operations.title: Threshold controls
operations.body: Use the rendered Threshold controls with identity, bitscore, e-value.

media.alt: Actual LOSATP threshold controls showing bitscore 50, e-value 1e-2, minimum identity 30, and minimum length 0.
media.caption: Set the LOSATP thresholds directly in the LOSAT settings panel.

manualSteps.title: Align the shared core
manualSteps.body: Use orthogroup alignment around og_1 and reverse-complement BGC0000713 so the conserved biosynthetic core is visually comparable across all five rows.

operations.title: Clicked og_1 feature Align button
operations.body: Click an og_1 CDS feature in the preview, then use Align in the feature popup.

media.alt: Actual feature popup for an og_1 CDS feature with the Align button highlighted.
media.caption: The feature popup exposes the orthogroup action buttons; click Align for the selected og_1 feature.

operations.title: Reverse-complement selector
operations.body: Use the rendered Reverse-complement selector with BGC0000713 selected.

media.alt: Actual fifth Linear input row for BGC0000713.gbk with the Region reverse complement checkbox checked.
media.caption: Use the BGC0000713 row's Region controls and check Reverse complement for that record only.

operations.title: Track layout selector
operations.body: Use the rendered Track Layout selector with Middle selected.

media.alt: Actual Linear Layout card with the Track Layout selector set to Middle.
media.caption: Set Track Layout to Middle from the rendered Layout card.

operations.title: Pairwise match style selector
operations.body: Use the rendered Pairwise Match Style selector with Curve selected.

media.alt: Actual Pairwise Match card with Pairwise Match Style set to Curve.
media.caption: Set Pairwise Match Style to Curve from the Pairwise Match card.

manualSteps.title: Set labels and figure layout
manualSteps.body: Use the saved session values for a compact manuscript-style comparison.

operations.title: Label and ruler layout controls
operations.body: Use the rendered Label and ruler layout controls with first-record labels, ruler, legend bottom.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC tutorial UI showing Label and ruler layout controls with first-record labels, ruler, legend bottom.
media.caption: The rendered web app crop shows Label and ruler layout controls; First-record labels, ruler, legend bottom.

manualSteps.title: Add the plot title and record text
manualSteps.body: Set the plot title to Aminoglycoside biosynthetic gene clusters from Streptomyces spp. Use species-level record labels and cluster subtitles when you want the web output to match the Gallery session exactly.

operations.title: Title and record text controls
operations.body: Use the rendered Title and record text controls with plot title and labels.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC tutorial UI showing Title and record text controls with plot title and labels.
media.caption: The rendered web app crop shows Title and record text controls; Plot title and labels.

manualSteps.title: Add feature color rules
manualSteps.body: Create four CDS rules from the antiSMASH gene_kind qualifier before generating the final figure.
items: CDS / gene_kind / biosynthetic$ / #d03535 / Core biosynthetic genes
CDS / gene_kind / biosynthetic-additional / #f787a9 / Additional biosynthetic genes
manualSteps.note: Use biosynthetic$ for the core category so it does not also catch biosynthetic-additional.

operations.title: Rule 1: core biosynthetic genes
operations.body: Enter CDS / gene_kind / biosynthetic$ / #d03535 / Core biosynthetic genes in the rendered SPECIFIC RULES (-t) controls.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC SPECIFIC RULES (-t) controls showing CDS / gene_kind / biosynthetic$ / #d03535 / Core biosynthetic genes.
media.caption: Enter CDS / gene_kind / biosynthetic$ / #d03535 / Core biosynthetic genes in the rendered SPECIFIC RULES (-t) row.

operations.title: Rule 2: additional biosynthetic genes
operations.body: Enter CDS / gene_kind / biosynthetic-additional / #f787a9 / Additional biosynthetic genes in the rendered SPECIFIC RULES (-t) controls.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC SPECIFIC RULES (-t) controls showing CDS / gene_kind / biosynthetic-additional / #f787a9 / Additional biosynthetic genes.
media.caption: Enter CDS / gene_kind / biosynthetic-additional / #f787a9 / Additional biosynthetic genes in the rendered SPECIFIC RULES (-t) row.

operations.title: Rule 3: transport genes
operations.body: Enter CDS / gene_kind / transport / #577edb / Transport-related genes in the rendered SPECIFIC RULES (-t) controls.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC SPECIFIC RULES (-t) controls showing CDS / gene_kind / transport / #577edb / Transport-related genes.
media.caption: Enter CDS / gene_kind / transport / #577edb / Transport-related genes in the rendered SPECIFIC RULES (-t) row.

operations.title: Rule 4: regulatory genes
operations.body: Enter CDS / gene_kind / regulatory / #57b767 / Regulatory genes in the rendered SPECIFIC RULES (-t) controls.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC SPECIFIC RULES (-t) controls showing CDS / gene_kind / regulatory / #57b767 / Regulatory genes.
media.caption: Enter CDS / gene_kind / regulatory / #57b767 / Regulatory genes in the rendered SPECIFIC RULES (-t) row.

manualSteps.title: Generate the diagram
manualSteps.body: Click Generate Diagram. The generated preview should show five BGC rows, blue orthogroup ribbons, rotated first-record labels, and a bottom legend.

media.alt: Generated aminoglycoside biosynthetic gene cluster comparison in the Gallery preview.
media.caption: The finished web figure combines antiSMASH gene-kind feature colors with orthogroup identity ribbons.

operations.title: Generated BGC comparison preview
operations.body: Inspect the generated preview with five rows + bottom legend.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC tutorial UI showing Generated BGC comparison preview with five rows + bottom legend.
media.caption: The generated preview crop shows five rows + bottom legend.

manualSteps.title: Inspect an orthogroup ribbon
manualSteps.body: Click a pairwise match ribbon to inspect the orthogroup ID, member count, record coverage, and member table.

media.alt: Aminoglycoside BGC comparison with an orthogroup match popup open.
media.caption: The orthogroup popup is the quickest way to confirm which proteins support a pairwise ribbon.

operations.title: Orthogroup ribbon popup
operations.body: Click the rendered feature or match so the Orthogroup ribbon popup is visible.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC tutorial UI showing Orthogroup ribbon popup with ribbon + popup.
media.caption: The real clicked popup crop shows Orthogroup ribbon popup with ribbon + popup.

manualSteps.title: Inspect a colored feature
manualSteps.body: Click a CDS feature to confirm its label, product, orthogroup membership, and qualifier values before deciding whether to refine a color rule.

media.alt: Aminoglycoside BGC comparison with a CDS feature popup open.
media.caption: Feature clicks expose the metadata behind labels and color-rule decisions.

operations.title: Colored feature popup
operations.body: Click the rendered feature or match so the Colored feature popup metadata is visible.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC tutorial UI showing Colored feature popup metadata with gene_kind and orthogroup fields.
media.caption: The real clicked popup crop shows Colored feature popup metadata with gene_kind and orthogroup fields.

colorRules.title: Use gene_kind for antiSMASH categories
colorRules.body: These BGC records carry antiSMASH gene_kind qualifiers, which are more reliable for core, additional, transport, and regulatory categories than broad product text.

colorRules.title: Use gene for label text
colorRules.body: Set the CDS qualifier priority to gene so rotated labels use concise gene names when available.

colorRules.title: Keep regex values specific
colorRules.body: Specific rule values are matching patterns. Use biosynthetic$ for core biosynthetic genes and a separate biosynthetic-additional rule for the additional category.

colorRules.title: Use product only as a fallback
colorRules.body: When gene_kind is absent, product can group functional categories, but terms such as protein, enzyme, or transporter may match more features than intended.

colorRules.title: Let the legend caption explain the biology
colorRules.body: Use captions such as Core biosynthetic genes and Transport-related genes instead of raw qualifier values.

postGenerationEdits.title: Click features before changing colors
postGenerationEdits.body: Use the feature popup to inspect gene, product, note, gene_kind, and orthogroup metadata. Then add or edit a rule only when the qualifier and value are specific enough.

operations.title: Colored feature popup
operations.body: Click the rendered feature or match so the Colored feature popup metadata is visible.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC tutorial UI showing Colored feature popup metadata with gene_kind and orthogroup fields.
media.caption: Feature popup metadata explains which qualifier values should drive color rules.

postGenerationEdits.title: Edit the legend
postGenerationEdits.body: Use the legend editor to adjust captions or ordering after generation. Keep the pairwise match identity legend visible because ribbon color encodes identity.

operations.title: Legend editor
operations.body: Use the rendered Legend editor with legend editor drawer.

media.alt: Actual aminoglycoside BGC tutorial UI showing Legend editor with legend editor drawer.
media.caption: The rendered web app crop shows Legend editor; Legend editor drawer.

postGenerationEdits.title: Export the figure
postGenerationEdits.body: Download SVG for editable vector output. Use PNG or PDF for quick sharing or draft figures.

operations.title: Export controls
operations.body: Use the rendered Preview export toolbar for SVG, Interactive SVG, PNG, or PDF.

media.alt: Actual Linear Preview export toolbar with the DPI selector and SVG, Interactive SVG, PNG, and PDF export buttons visible.
media.caption: The rendered .preview-toolbar crop shows DPI plus SVG, Interactive SVG, PNG, and PDF export controls.

postGenerationEdits.title: Save a session
postGenerationEdits.body: Save a .gbdraw-session.json after edits so the web app can restore inputs, LOSATP cache, settings, generated output, and SVG adjustments.

operations.title: Session save controls
operations.body: Use the rendered web app header toolbar and click Save Session.

media.alt: Actual Linear web app header toolbar with Save Session, Load Session, Reset Settings, undo and redo, the session title, and mode controls visible.
media.caption: The rendered .app-toolbar crop shows Save Session in the same header toolbar used to load sessions.

losatTips.title: Start with Auto execution
losatTips.body: Auto uses threaded LOSAT only when the browser supports it and the workload justifies it.

losatTips.title: Prefer Safe total threads
losatTips.body: Safe avoids consuming every logical CPU and is the best default for keeping the browser responsive.

losatTips.title: Use orthogroups for protein-level BGC comparison
losatTips.body: Orthogroup mode keeps related proteins linked even when local gene order differs across clusters.

losatTips.title: Tune Max hits and identity together
losatTips.body: Lower Max hits or raise identity when the figure has too many weak ribbons; raise Max hits only when expected homologs are missing.

losatTips.title: Reuse the cache
losatTips.body: Raw LOSAT results are reused when canonical inputs and LOSAT settings match, so label, color, and legend changes should be faster after the first run.

troubleshooting.title: The rows do not line up like the Gallery figure
troubleshooting.body: Confirm the input order, Align orthogroup feature og_1, and reverse-complement setting for BGC0000713.

troubleshooting.title: Core genes are not red
troubleshooting.body: Confirm the input GenBank files include gene_kind qualifiers and that the core rule uses biosynthetic$.

troubleshooting.title: Labels are missing or too dense
troubleshooting.body: Use Show labels: first record, label placement above feature, and 45 degree label rotation. If needed, reduce labels by tightening the label filter.

troubleshooting.title: Threaded LOSAT is unavailable
troubleshooting.body: Use Auto or Serial execution. Some browser contexts disable SharedArrayBuffer or cross-origin isolation, which prevents threaded WebAssembly.

troubleshooting.title: The generated diagram differs from the Gallery image
troubleshooting.body: Confirm orthogroup mode, identity and bitscore thresholds, max hits, track layout, legend position, label rotation, color rules, and record orientation.

related.label: Compare with the Hepatoplasmataceae orthogroup example
